note: Advisory filing expectations per data-protection regime, keyed by the regime display string from regimes.json (regime_of). Citations are references only — never adjudication of filing sufficiency. 'static' fields are filled from scan findings; 'org' fields cannot be known statically and render as blanks for the organisation to complete.

PDPO.heading: PDPO (Hong Kong) — cross-border transfer documentation
citations: PDPO (Cap. 486) s.33 — cross-border transfer restriction (not yet in operation; PCPD recommends contractual safeguards meanwhile)
PCPD Guidance on Personal Data Protection in Cross-border Data Transfer, incl. the Recommended Model Contractual Clauses
PCPD Artificial Intelligence: Model Personal Data Protection Framework (2024) — third-party AI supply-chain expectations
static: model provenance blocs and developer organisations
data classification (as class of personal data)

PIPL.heading: PIPL (Mainland China) — PIA and cross-border transfer route documentation
citations: PIPL Arts. 38–40 — transfer routes: CAC security assessment, standard contract filing, or certification (plus the 2024 Provisions exemptions)
PIPL Arts. 55–56 — personal information protection impact assessment (PIA) record
GBA Standard Contract — (Mainland, Hong Kong) and (Mainland, Macao) variants for qualifying intra-GBA transfers of personal information (no important data)
static: model provenance blocs and developer organisations
data classification (as category of personal information)
org: purpose and necessity of each transfer
declared transfer route and filing status

Macao PDPA.heading: Macao PDPA — transfer outside Macao documentation
citations: Macao Personal Data Protection Act (Law 8/2005) Arts. 19–20 — transfers of personal data outside Macao
GBA Standard Contract — (Mainland, Macao) variant for qualifying intra-GBA transfers
static: model provenance blocs and developer organisations

PDPA (SG).heading: PDPA (Singapore) — transfer limitation documentation
citations: PDPA s.26 — transfer limitation obligation (comparable protection)
PDPC Advisory Guidelines on Key Concepts — transfer limitation: contractual clauses, BCRs, or certification (incl. APEC CBPR/PRP)
PDPC Model AI Governance Framework — third-party AI and data supply-chain expectations
static: model provenance blocs and developer organisations
org: legal basis: contractual clauses / BCRs / certification relied on
